# Changelog

- docs(readme): feature support table: move api column to end and link api methods to docs

## 0.4.2

- fix readme not shown on crates.io

## 0.4.1 - publish to crates.io

- remove some keywords to fit into limit of 5 keywords and comply to other keyword rules

## 0.4.0 - publish to crates.io

- fix license string
- fix cargo exclude list

## 0.3.0 - Dedicated repo

`user-notify` now has it's own repo.

- docs: improved Readme
- docs: feature support by operating systems
- docs: improved documentation in code
- change: changed to LGPL3-or-later License
- dev: added optional nix development shell
- dev: stricter clippy rules for better code quality.
- ci: added ci for clippy, rustdoc and rustfmt checks

## 0.1.0 - Inital version

Before this was a standalone crate, this crate was part of the <https://github.com/deltachat/deltachat-desktop> repo.
